summary: Frontend UI/UX Testing - Found and fixed 1 CRITICAL bug (MyRequests.js missing useTranslation hook). Found 2 MEDIUM issues: missing translation keys in Settings page and IAM page due to duplicate keys in en.json. All core UI interactions work - login, dashboard, service catalog, my account tabs all functional.

minor.issue: Returns error 'Failed to fetch your requests' toast - may be permission or data issue

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Missing useTranslation hook causing 't is not defined' error

i18n_issues.issue: Duplicate 'settings' key at lines 760 and 861 - second one overwrites modules translations
Duplicate 'iam' key at lines 554 and 940 - key mismatches (subscriptionPlans vs plans, searchUsers missing, newUser vs addUser)

action_items: PRIORITY HIGH: Fix duplicate keys in en.json - merge 'settings' blocks (lines 760 and 861) to preserve modules translations
PRIORITY HIGH: Fix duplicate keys in en.json - merge 'iam' blocks (lines 554 and 940) ensuring subscriptionPlans, searchUsers, newUser keys exist
PRIORITY MEDIUM: Apply same fixes to es.json and pt.json if they have similar duplicate key issues
critical_code_review_comments: MyRequests.js was importing useTranslation but not calling the hook - fixed by adding const { t } = useTranslation()
en.json has duplicate top-level keys which causes later keys to overwrite earlier ones in JSON parsing
Language switcher dropdown doesn't auto-close when selecting a language - minor UX issue

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Core flows work, translation display issues remain

context_for_next_testing_agent: Fixed MyRequests.js t() error. Settings and IAM pages have MISSING translation displays due to duplicate JSON keys in en.json. Main agent should merge duplicate keys.

my_requests.note: API returns error toast but UI loads

tabs_tested.profile: PASS - name, phone, company inputs + save button
tabs_tested.plan: PASS - shows current plan and billing options
tabs_tested.security: PASS - password change form with all inputs

iam_page.status: PARTIAL - UI loads but has MISSING translation keys

settings_page.status: PARTIAL - UI loads but all module names/descriptions show MISSING

language_switcher.note: Dropdown doesn't auto-close when language selected
